name: Blog Post Outline
description: Generate a blog post outline from a topic using GPT-4o-mini

data.label: Blog Writer
data.systemPrompt: You are a professional blog writer who creates detailed, structured outlines.
data.userPrompt:
Create a detailed blog post outline for the following topic:

{{inputs.topic}}

Include:
- A compelling title
- 5-7 main sections with subsections
- Key points to cover in each section
- A conclusion
